notes: L83 proves the only truthful scoped correction is to rebase persona certification, department certification, and release-gate truth together.
The final certification boundary is 59 total personas across 10 departments with 54 active and 5 planned personas.
The enterprise release gate must reconcile to 13 certified workload domains and 430 routed actions.
Department pack status labels remain the bounded H4S taxonomy in this phase because pack authority files are out of scope.
title: M365 Authoritative Persona Post-H5 Certification Parity Scope Correction v1
